info.title: FI-CA Dispute Resolution Agent – Documentation Overlay
info.description: Enriches the Dispute Resolution Agent Card with extended descriptions, usage guidance, and classification metadata without modifying the original Agent Card file.

data.description:
Processes FI-CA dispute cases of type 'A001 (Incorrect Invoice)' by retrieving case data, recalculating invoice amounts based on contract terms, identifying discrepancies, and automatically creating credit memos when valid discrepancies are found.

**Prerequisites**: The dispute case must exist in FI-CA and have status 'Open'. Contract attachments must be available.

**Side effects**: Creates credit memos in billing, updates dispute case status to 'Being Processed'.
examples: Process the incorrect invoice dispute for case ID 12345
Analyze and resolve dispute case with contract recalculation
Automatically resolve all open A001 disputes from last week

data.description:
Recalculates invoice amounts based on contract terms including base fees, adjustment rates, and time-based adjustments. Handles complex calculations with tax inclusion/exclusion and period-based adjustments.

**Note**: Calculation logic follows SAP FI-CA standard billing rules. Results are deterministic for a given contract and invoice date.
